speaker: Dispatch
title: Festival tape is live cargo
subtitle: Mirador Skyline wants the master reel before the stage lights cut. No heroics, just speed.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Keep the music alive
subtitle: The route picks the mood. Harbor stays intimate. Neon goes wide-screen.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: I can see your taillights from the bridge
subtitle: Take the high road if you want the glamorous line. Take the docks if you can actually drive.

speaker: Dispatch
title: Route split ahead
subtitle: Harbor Slip keeps the skyline low and busy. Neon Express is cleaner, faster, and less forgiving.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Harbor Slip postcard
subtitle: Container lights smear across the water while the cranes slice the moonlight above the docks.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: You chose the harder rhythm
subtitle: Good. The dock road only looks calm until the brake lights stack and the lane disappears.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Neon Express postcard
subtitle: The elevated line opens and the city turns into ribbons of glass, signs, and impossible blue light.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: That skyline lane suits you
subtitle: Don't admire it too long. The express is generous right up until it isn't.

speaker: Dispatch
title: Final approach
subtitle: Stage lights are visible from the overpass. Keep the tape clean and the car pointed at Mirador.

speaker: Dispatch
title: Afterparty cassette is moving
subtitle: Main stage is breathing. Lumen Heights wants the afterparty reel before the observatory lights cycle down.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Same city, different landing
subtitle: Harbor keeps it warm and close. Crown Vista opens the whole hilltop like a reveal shot.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: You still owe the city one more run
subtitle: Anyone can hit the skyline once. The hilltop asks whether you can land the afterglow too.

speaker: Dispatch
title: Heights split ahead
subtitle: Marina Underpass stays warmer and tighter. Crown Vista climbs cleaner, faster, and closer to the walls.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Marina Underpass postcard
subtitle: Ferry windows drift above the service road while amber rails pull the whole lower line toward the hilltop.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: Warm route, sharp traffic
subtitle: The marina line looks forgiving until the tunnel shadows close and the packs stop giving lane.

speaker: DJ Vale
title: Crown Vista postcard
subtitle: Terrace glass catches the whole city at once and the observatory ring starts to read like a finish line in the sky.

speaker: Rival / Sera
title: High line, no excuses
subtitle: You wanted the overlook. Keep it clean, because those terrace walls turn tiny mistakes into a full reset.

speaker: Dispatch
title: Observatory final
subtitle: Hilltop lights are live. Keep the cassette steady and let the afterparty reveal land on time.
